title: spenceria ramalana var. ramalana
intro: Spenceria ramalana var. ramalana, commonly known as the Himalayan spenceria, is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is used to treat a range of health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Spenceria ramalana var. ramalana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various conditions. In traditional medicine, Spenceria ramalana var. ramalana is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is commonly used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine practices.
